QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: adsbServerConnectEnabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Enable connection to an ADS-B SBS-1 server to receive nearby aircraft tracking data.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.longDesc: Connect to ADSB SBS-1 server using specified address/port
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Connect to ADSB SBS server

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: adsbServerHostAddress
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: IP address or hostname of the ADS-B SBS-1 server to connect to.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Host address

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: adsbServerPort
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Network port number on which the ADS-B SBS-1 server is listening.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Server port
